API docs by Redocly

SwiftFiat API (1.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

API Support: support@swiftfiat.com URL: http://www.swiftfiat.com/support License: MIT Terms of Service

SwiftFiat Backend API for cryptocurrency and fiat transactions

Wallets

Add to Wallet Balance (Admin Only)

Adds a specified amount to a user's wallet balance. This endpoint is intended for administrative use only.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Request Body

object

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/admin/v1/wallets/add-to-wallet-balance

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{ }

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "balance": "string",
  • "created_at": "string",
  • "currency": "string",
  • "customer_id": 0,
  • "id": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "type": "string",
  • "updated_at": "string"
}

Create Transaction Fee

Creates or updates the fee structure for a specific transaction type.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Transaction Fee Details

fee_percentage
number >= 0

changed to gte=0

max_fee
number >= 0
transaction_type
required
string

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/admin/v1/wallets/transaction-fee

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "fee_percentage": 0,
  • "max_fee": 0,
  • "transaction_type": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "created_at": "string",
  • "effective_time": "string",
  • "fee_percentage": "string",
  • "flat_fee": "string",
  • "id": 0,
  • "max_fee": "string",
  • "source": "string",
  • "transaction_type": "string"
}

Get User Wallets

Retrieves the wallets associated with the authenticated user.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/wallets

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "balance": "string",
    • "created_at": "string",
    • "currency": "string",
    • "customer_id": 0,
    • "id": "string",
    • "status": "string",
    • "type": "string",
    • "updated_at": "string"
    }
]

Get Bank List

Retrieves a list of supported banks for fiat transactions. Can be filtered using a query parameter.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
query
string

Search query to filter banks

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/wallets/banks

Response samples

  • 200
  • 500
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "code": "string",
    • "logo_url": "string",
    • "longcode": "string",
    • "name": "string",
    • "slug": "string"
    }
]

Get User's Beneficiaries

Retrieves the list of saved beneficiaries for the authenticated user.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/wallets/beneficiaries

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "account_number": "string",
      • "bank_code": "string",
      • "beneficiary_name": "string",
      • "created_at": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "updated_at": "string",
      • "user_id": 0
      }
    ],
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

Resolve Bank Account

Validates and retrieves bank account details using account number and bank code.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
accountNumber
required
string

Bank account number

bankCode
required
string

Bank code

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/wallets/resolve-bank-account

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "account_name": "string",
    • "account_number": "string"
    },
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

Resolve User Tag

Resolves a user tag to retrieve associated wallet information for a specific currency.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
userTag
required
string

User tag to resolve

currency
required
string

Currency code (USD|NGN|EUR)

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/wallets/resolve-user-tag

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "currency": "string",
    • "customer_id": 0,
    • "customer_name": "string",
    • "status": "string",
    • "wallet_id": "string"
    },
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

Swap Between Currencies

Performs a currency swap between user's wallets. This endpoint handles currency conversion between supported currencies.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Swap Request

object

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/wallets/swap

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{ }

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "created_at": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "id": "string",
  • "metadata": {
    • "currency": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "destination_wallet": "string",
    • "fees": "string",
    • "id": "string",
    • "rate": "string",
    • "received_amount": "string",
    • "sent_amount": "string",
    • "source_wallet": "string",
    • "transfer_type": "string",
    • "user_tag": "string"
    },
  • "status": "string",
  • "transaction_flow": "string",
  • "type": "string",
  • "updated_at": "string"
}

Get Transaction Fee

Retrieves the fee structure for a specific transaction type.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
type
required
string

Transaction type (Transfer|Withdrawal|Deposit|Swap|GiftCard|Airtime)

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/wallets/transaction-fee

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "created_at": "string",
  • "effective_time": "string",
  • "fee_percentage": "string",
  • "flat_fee": "string",
  • "id": 0,
  • "max_fee": "string",
  • "source": "string",
  • "transaction_type": "string"
}

Get User Wallet Transactions

Retrieves the transactions associated with the authenticated user's wallets.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
page_limit
integer

Number of transactions to retrieve per page

page_offset
integer

Offset for pagination

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/wallets/transactions

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "created_at": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "metadata": null,
      • "status": "string",
      • "transaction_flow": "string",
      • "type": "string",
      • "updated_at": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

Get User Wallet Transactions with Cursor Pagination

Retrieves the transactions associated with the authenticated user's wallets using cursor-based pagination.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
cursor_date
string

Cursor date for pagination (RFC3339 format)

cursor_transaction_id
string

Cursor transaction ID for pagination

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/wallets/transactions-cursor

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "created_at": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "metadata": null,
      • "status": "string",
      • "transaction_flow": "string",
      • "type": "string",
      • "updated_at": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

Get Single Wallet Transaction

Retrieves a specific transaction associated with the authenticated user's wallet.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Transaction ID

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/wallets/transactions/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "created_at": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "id": "string",
    • "metadata": null,
    • "status": "string",
    • "transaction_flow": "string",
    • "type": "string",
    • "updated_at": "string"
    },
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

Transfer Between Wallets

Performs a transfer between user wallets. This endpoint handles internal transfers between users' wallets.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Transfer Request

object

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/wallets/transfer

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{ }

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "created_at": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "id": "string",
  • "metadata": {
    • "currency": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "destination_wallet": "string",
    • "fees": "string",
    • "id": "string",
    • "rate": "string",
    • "received_amount": "string",
    • "sent_amount": "string",
    • "source_wallet": "string",
    • "transfer_type": "string",
    • "user_tag": "string"
    },
  • "status": "string",
  • "transaction_flow": "string",
  • "type": "string",
  • "updated_at": "string"
}

Perform Fiat Transfer

Executes a fiat currency transfer to a bank account.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Fiat Transfer Request

object

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/wallets/withdraw

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{ }

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "saved_beneficiary": true,
  • "transaction": {
    • "created_at": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "id": "string",
    • "metadata": {
      • "account_name": "string",
      • "account_number": "string",
      • "bank_code": "string",
      • "fees": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "rate": "string",
      • "received_amount": "string",
      • "sent_amount": "string",
      • "service_provider": "string",
      • "service_transaction_id": "string",
      • "source_wallet": "string"
      },
    • "status": "string",
    • "transaction_flow": "string",
    • "type": "string",
    • "updated_at": "string"
    }
}

Analytics

Get Active Users Count

Retrieve the count of active users for a specific date. Accessible only by admin, super admin, or customer rep.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
date
string
Default: "today's date"

Date in YYYY-MM-DD format

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/analytics/active-users-today

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": { },
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

Get Activity Logs for a User

Retrieve activity logs for a specific user by their ID. Accessible only by admin, super admin, or customer rep.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
integer

User ID

query Parameters
limit
integer
Default: 50

Limit number of logs

offset
integer
Default: 0

Offset for pagination

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/analytics/activity-log/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 500
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "action": "string",
    • "createdAt": "string",
    • "id": 0,
    • "ip": "string",
    • "userAgent": "string",
    • "userID": 0
    }
]

Delete Old Activity Logs

Delete activity logs older than a certain threshold. Accessible only by admin.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/analytics/activity-logs

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": null,
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

Get Recent Activity Logs

Retrieve recent activity logs. Accessible only by admin, super admin, or customer rep.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
query Parameters
limit
integer
Default: 50

Limit number of logs

offset
integer
Default: 0

Offset for pagination

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/analytics/activity-logs

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 500
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "action": "string",
    • "createdAt": "string",
    • "id": 0,
    • "ip": "string",
    • "userAgent": "string",
    • "userID": 0
    }
]

Responses

Admin Edit User

Admin can edit user details such as first name, last name, email, phone number, and role.

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Admin Edit User Request

email
string
first_name
string
last_name
string
phone_number
string
role
string

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/analytics/edit-user/{id}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "string",
  • "first_name": "string",
  • "last_name": "string",
  • "phone_number": "string",
  • "role": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "avatar_url": "string",
  • "created_at": "string",
  • "email": "string",
  • "first_name": "string",
  • "fresh_chat_id": "string",
  • "has_passcode": true,
  • "has_pin": true,
  • "id": 0,
  • "is_active": true,
  • "last_name": "string",
  • "phone_number": "string",
  • "twofa_enabled": true,
  • "twofa_secret": "string",
  • "updated_at": "string",
  • "user_id": 0,
  • "user_tag": "string",
  • "verified": true
}

required

string

Forgot password

Initiate password reset process by sending an OTP to the user's email

Request Body schema: application/json
required

forgot password request

email

User login [2fa UNTESTED]

Authenticate user with email and password If 2FA is enabled, a temporary token will be returned for 2FA verification, if its a new device or no active session If user is admin, an OTP will be sent to email for verification

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Login credentials

email
required
string
password
required
string

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/auth/login

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "string",
  • "password": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "token": "string",
    • "user": {
      • "avatar_url": "string",
      • "created_at": "string",
      • "email": "string",
      • "first_name": "string",
      • "fresh_chat_id": "string",
      • "has_passcode": true,
      • "has_pin": true,
      • "id": 0,
      • "is_active": true,
      • "last_name": "string",
      • "phone_number": "string",
      • "twofa_enabled": true,
      • "twofa_secret": "string",
      • "updated_at": "string",
      • "user_id": 0,
      • "user_tag": "string",
      • "verified": true
      }
    },
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

required

Crypto

Get Coin Data

Retrieves detailed information about a specific cryptocurrency coin using the CoinRanking provider.

query Parameters
coin
required
string

Coin Symbol (e.g., BTC, ETH)

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/crypto/coin-data

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": null,
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

Get Coin Price History

Retrieves historical price data for a specific cryptocurrency coin over a defined time period using the CoinRanking provider.

query Parameters
coin
required
string

Coin Symbol (e.g., BTC, ETH)

timePeriod
string
Default: "24h"

Time Period (e.g., 24h, 7d, 1m, 1y)

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/crypto/coin-price-data

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": null,
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

Creates a stablecoin funding address for the authenticated user using the Cryptomus provider. Supported stablecoins are USDT and USDC.

required

string

      • "updated_at": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "message": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

object (db.CreateYieldConfigParams)

BearerAuth
query Parameters
status
string

Filter by status (active, completed, paused)

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/vault/goals

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "auto_save_amount": "string",
    • "auto_save_enabled": true,
    • "auto_save_frequency": "string",
    • "completed_at": "string",
    • "created_at": "string",
    • "currency": "string",
    • "current_balance": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "goal_amount": "string",
    • "id": "string",
    • "last_yield_calculation": "string",
    • "next_auto_save": "string",
    • "next_yield_calculation": "string",
    • "recurring_rule": {
      • "property1": null,
      • "property2": null
      },
    • "status": "string",
    • "total_yield_earned": "string",
    • "updated_at": "string",
    • "user_id": 0,
    • "vault_name": "string",
    • "vault_type": "string"
    }
]

Create Vault Savings Goal

Create a new savings goal with optional recurring deposits

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Create Goal Request

currency
required
string
Enum: "NGN" "USD" "USDC" "USDT"
description
string
name
required
string
object (vaultsavings.RecurringRule)
target_amount
required
string
vault_type
string
Default: "flexible"
Enum: "flexible" "locked"

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/vault/goals

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "currency": "NGN",
  • "description": "Saving for a trip to Hawaii",
  • "name": "Vacation Fund",
  • "recurring_rule": {
    • "amount": "100.00",
    • "day_of_month": 15,
    • "day_of_week": 5,
    • "enabled": true,
    • "end_date": "2024-12-31T00:00:00Z",
    • "execution_count": 0,
    • "interval": "daily",
    • "last_execution_at": "string",
    • "max_executions": 12,
    • "max_retries": 0,
    • "metadata": {
      • "property1": null,
      • "property2": null
      },
    • "next_execution_at": "string",
    • "notify_on_failure": true,
    • "notify_on_success": true,
    • "pause_on_low_balance": true,
    • "retry_count": 0,
    • "retry_on_failure": true,
    • "skip_weekends": true,
    • "start_date": "2024-07-01T00:00:00Z",
    • "time_of_day": "09:00"
    },
  • "target_amount": "5000.00",
  • "vault_type": "flexible"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "auto_save_amount": "string",
  • "auto_save_enabled": true,
  • "auto_save_frequency": "string",
  • "completed_at": "string",
  • "created_at": "string",
  • "currency": "string",
  • "current_balance": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "goal_amount": "string",
  • "id": "string",
  • "last_yield_calculation": "string",
  • "next_auto_save": "string",
  • "next_yield_calculation": "string",
  • "recurring_rule": {
    • "property1": null,
    • "property2": null
    },
  • "status": "string",
  • "total_yield_earned": "string",
  • "updated_at": "string",
  • "user_id": 0,
  • "vault_name": "string",
  • "vault_type": "string"
}

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Vault Goal ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Deposit Request

amount
string
description
string
from_wallet_id
string

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/vault/goals/{id}/deposit

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "amount": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "from_wallet_id": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "admin_approved_at": "string",
  • "admin_approved_by": 0,
  • "amount": "string",
  • "approval_notes": "string",
  • "balance_after": "string",
  • "balance_before": "string",
  • "completed_at": "string",
  • "created_at": "string",
  • "currency": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "destination_wallet": "string",
  • "id": "string",
  • "metadata": {
    • "property1": null,
    • "property2": null
    },
  • "reference": "string",
  • "requires_2fa": true,
  • "requires_admin_approval": true,
  • "source_wallet": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "transaction_type": "string",
  • "two_fa_verified_at": "string",
  • "user_id": 0,
  • "vault_id": "string"
}

Update Recurring Rule

Update recurring deposit settings for a vault goal

Authorizations:
BearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Vault Goal ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Update Recurring Request

amount
string
day_of_month
integer
day_of_week
integer (vaultsavings.Weekday)
Enum: 1 2 3 4 5 6 7
enabled
boolean
interval
string (vaultsavings.Interval)
Enum: "daily" "weekly" "monthly"
max_executions
integer
skip_weekends
boolean
time_of_day
string

Responses

https://localhost:8080/api/v1/api/v1/vault/goals/{id}/recurring

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

  • "amount": "string",
  • "day_of_month": 0,
  • "day_of_week": 1,
  • "enabled": true,
  • "interval": "daily",
  • "max_executions": 0,
  • "skip_weekends": true,
  • "time_of_day": "string"
}

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500

application/json

path Parameters

string
